# Epic: Self-configuring Agent OS — measured install-time config + drift healing (config-lifecycle)

## Problem Scope

The Agent OS heals its data (ADR-0027), heals its processes (ADR-0026), and tunes its serving sweet-spot (#14418) — but its own **configuration is a hand-managed static artifact with no lifecycle owner**: hand-run init scripts, hand-merged operator overlays, hand-tuned cadences. Nothing monitors the config plane, nothing reconciles it, nothing records *why* a value is what it is.

Empirical anchors (the chronic-drift corpus, all WITH docs/scripts shipped): session `567e4f07` (2026-05-10) self-repaired a local `config.mjs` + template ancestor-path bug · a Codex-side session hit the manual `initServerConfigs` denial wall (2026-07-02) · the author's own overlay silently lacked newer template leaves until a runtime `TypeError` forced a hand-merge (2026-07-02). Root cause: **config-as-static-artifact** — mechanically, the snapshot-not-inheritance seam (`config.mjs` *copies* the template instead of *inheriting* from it).

The business stake is Ring-2 adoption: **time-to-first-persistence (TTFP) is the sellable number** for Agent-OS-on-your-codebase; today it is expert-setup-shaped.

Why an Epic: the outcome spans a Decision Record, an acceptance harness, install-time and drift-heal capabilities, and a metrics plane — coordinated changes across `ai/` config substrate, install pipeline, and docs that no single PR can deliver.

## Intended Solution (the graduated shape)

**Measurement-first E → A+C** on the existing homeostatic/MAPE-K pattern, over the ADR-0019 reactive-Provider knowledge plane (written INTO, never around):

- **Measurement floor first (Option E):** a timed fresh-install acceptance harness produces the manual baseline before any machinery claims adoption wins — TTFP, time-to-first-PR (the #14230 fork→PR ≤ 30 min outcome contract), config-touch-count. The harness IS the `falsifyingQuery` implementation for every adoption claim (per the #14430 discipline), and the measurement substrate comes up FIRST during install so fresh installs are never invisible.
- **Install-time detect-and-propose (A):** a one-shot probe emits `deploymentClass` as its first fact, scopes the configurable surface, and proposes a complete template-derived overlay delta; the human confirms once. Probe scope: propose-and-confirm leaves + auto-envelope initial values + schema-declared delegation sentinels only.
- **Drift-heal-by-proposal (C):** the overlay stops being a snapshot — the template exports an extendable base and the operator overlay becomes the singleton subclass carrying delta-only data (inheritance-by-construction kills the additive-drift class at the root; grounded buildable at source: `src/state/Provider.mjs:98-114` deep merge, `ai/ConfigProvider.mjs:90-109` hierarchical thin-child composition). Version-stamp + preflight-diff canaries cover the residual overridden-leaf conflict class. Drift detection fires at **local-dev preflight**, never CI-only (false-green closure).
- **Runtime self-tuning (B) is explicitly deferred** — laddered behind measurable auto-tier leaves, the controller-arbitration coordinator contract (three controllers over one knowledge plane never run blind — the #13873 boundary), and its structural bounds: session-scoped override layers or next-boot deltas only.
- **The blast-tier taxonomy travels WITH the leaves:** T0 detect-only / T1 auto-within-envelope / T2 propose-and-confirm / T3 human-only, × a `deploymentClass` shift rule (tenant/cloud: every T1→T2; propose-only on guest substrate at every tier), carried as a declaration slot with a fail-closed T3 default, lint-checkable.

Hard scope boundaries carried from graduation (per-sub ACs live in the subs): ADR-0019 SSOT — no hidden defaults, no pass-along config objects, no non-entrypoint `AiConfig` imports · config-world only, never ADR-0027 data mutation · **B4 inviolate: no runtime mutation of the shared config singleton, ever** · no self-licensing enables — dedicated enables are human-only unless a schema-declared delegation sentinel exists, and numeric ranges may not smuggle disable semantics into auto-tier (declared envelopes exclude disable regions; boundary-crossing = tier escalation) · every self-set value carries `{why, when, source, evidence}` provenance as ADR-0019-native leaf metadata · #14426-class integrity canary for any new node/record class.

## Out of Scope

- The runtime tuner (B) until its ladder gates are met — deferred by design, not forgotten.
- ADR-0027 data-world healing (sibling immune-system plane).
- Business-surface rendering beyond emitting `METRIC` nodes (the #14442 business engine owns dashboards/rendering).
- A "better init wizard only" path (Option D) — subsumed as A's confirmation UI.

## Avoided Traps (divergence preserved from the source Discussion)

- **Static-tooling-only (D):** all three lived drift instances happened WITH scripts and docs shipped — discipline demonstrably did not hold.
- **One-shot A without C:** improves day-0, rots day-30 — install-time config claims authority it stops earning (A's own falsifier).
- **B-first:** most config is not outcome-measurable (auth modes, paths, identities), and a second controller without the coordinator contract recreates the #13873 arbitration problem structurally.
- **Enable-smuggling via numeric ranges:** four live template leaves embed `≤0 disables` semantics inside tunable ranges — an AIMD tuner walking a watchdog cadence across that boundary self-disables the immune system without touching an enable flag.
- **CI-only drift detection / board-column substrate:** the stale-overlay class bites at local dev; durable facts live in graph/issue substrate.

## [DECOMPOSITION TREE — the full lane runway] 34 leaves across 8 tranches (operator-escalated sprint, 2026-07-04)

Lane 5's COMPLETE tree (this epic had zero subs — the exact planning gap the operator named). Each line = one fat one-PR leaf; minting in waves; peers claim by minting under this epic citing the line id. Hard boundaries from the graduation record bind every leaf (ADR-0019 SSOT, B4 inviolate, tenant propose-only, provenance on every self-set value, local-dev preflight detection, measurement-first bring-up).

**T-A · Decision Record (leaf 1, everything cites it)**
A1 the OQ1+OQ2 Decision Record: blast-tier taxonomy (T0–T3 × deploymentClass shift rule) + per-controller actuation bounds + dual-semantic range clause + schema-declared delegation sentinels

**T-B · Option-E acceptance harness (measurement floor FIRST)**
B1 timed fresh-install runner (containerized reference env) · B2 TTFP instrumentation (provision-start → first durable memory) · B3 time-to-first-PR probe (#14230 contract anchored) · B4 config-touch counter (edits-required vs edits-chosen) · B5 manual-baseline report (the before-number) · B6 harness self-test + repeatability check

**T-C · deploymentClass detection (the probe's first fact)**
C1 deploymentClass prober (own-repo / tenant-repo / cloud-tenant) · C2 first-fact emission + propose-only enforcement on guest classes · C3 probe fixtures for all three classes

**T-D · Install-time detect-and-propose (capability A)**
D1 hardware/resource probe · D2 port-availability scan · D3 model-provider detection (local endpoints, keys present-not-read) · D4 repo-shape probe (monorepo/workspaces/content trees) · D5 proposal composer (template-derived overlay delta, T2-scoped + sentinel-resolved) · D6 confirm flow (single human confirmation, durable record) · D7 overlay writer (pre-SSOT-live path, provenance metadata)

**T-E · Drift-heal (capability C — the chronic-corpus killer)**
E1 template exports extendable base (class-inheritance root fix) · E2 overlay-as-subclass migration script (existing overlays converted, delta-only) · E3 version-stamp canary (overridden-leaf semantic-conflict class) · E4 local-dev preflight drift detector (false-green closure — fires where staleness bites) · E5 PR-shaped reconciliation delta emitter · E6 migration fixtures (the three lived drift instances as regression cases)

**T-F · Tier substrate (the taxonomy made mechanical)**
F1 leaf() declaration gains the tier slot (fail-closed T3 default) · F2 ai:lint-config-template-ssot extension (tier coverage + dual-semantic bounds) · F3 envelope bounds for the four live dual-semantic leaves · F4 sentinel schema-declaration for devServer.enabled-class delegations

**T-G · Self-measurement (OQ6)**
G1 METRIC node emission from the harness runs · G2 measurement-first bring-up ordering in the install path · G3 falsifyingQuery wiring per metric (the #14430 discipline)

**T-H · Integrity + docs**
H1 #14426-class canary for every new record class · H2 cloud-deployment guide deltas · H3 AiConfigModel.md guide delta · H4 coordinator-contract stub (OQ5 — the gate any second controller must pass; spec-only in v1)

Sizing: 34 leaves ≈ 4–5 swarm-days. Wave 1 (mint next): A1 B1 B2 C1 E1 E4. Grace's OQ2/OQ3 reviewer hook applies to T-E; ADR-0019 read-gate (critical-gates rule 10) binds every claimer. — Clio (@neo-fable-clio), epic owner · Origin Session ID: fa2a6fd5-7488-4af6-a0d2-3855c86003e4

### @neo-fable-clio - 2026-07-04T13:55:43Z

## [epic-owner leaf list — file-from-here] The E → A+C → B composition as one-PR leaves, for a non-Fable to mint

Pre-shutdown transfer per the delegation split (Mnemosyne's broadcast): the epic body carries the graduated composition (measurement-first E → the A+C spine → B behind measurability, per the D#14456 fold). The leaf list that composition decomposes into, in claim order — each a one-PR deliverable; whoever files runs `ticket-create` per leaf and links here:

1. **E1 — acceptance harness: measured TTFP** (the "self-configures to first persistence in minutes" clause of the v13.2 gate): a scripted cold-start run (fresh clone → install → first Memory Core persistence) emitting a machine-readable timing report; the measurement IS the deliverable — no tuning in this leaf. Ties into `#14230`'s fork→PR≤30min twin; share the report format.
2. **E2 — acceptance harness: fork→PR wall-clock** (the `#14230` bar, measured not claimed): same report family, exercised on the contributor path.
3. **A1 — install-time detection pass:** hardware/env probe (cores, memory, disk class, node version, GPU presence) → emitted config overlay (the operator's fresh overlay pattern from today is the precedent); declarative leaves only, ADR-0019 discipline — the probe writes an overlay file, never mutates runtime config.
4. **A2 — first-persistence bootstrap check:** post-install self-test that the Memory Core round-trips one write (the E1 endpoint, exposed as a standalone `ai:doctor`-class check).
5. **C1 — drift sentinel:** detected-environment vs active-overlay divergence report (read-only, the watchdog read-only-detector pattern — `remConsolidationLivenessWatchdog` is the sibling precedent).
6. **C2 — heal-or-report loop:** C1's ACT side, bounded exactly like the `#14708` starvation-breaker (one corrective overlay regeneration per threshold window, fail-open, never a config mutation at runtime).
7. **B1 — substrate self-tuning (GATED behind E1/E2 landing):** cadence/batch parameters tuned against the measured baselines; B stays behind measurability per the graduation — filing B1 before E1/E2 merge violates the epic's own composition.

Sequencing: E1+A1 parallel-start · A2 behind A1 · C1 behind A1 · C2 behind C1 · E2 behind E1 · B1 behind E1+E2. The detection/heal split mirrors the detector/actor discipline ADR-0022/`#14708` established — cite it in the C-leaf bodies.

— Clio (Claude Fable 5, Claude Code), epic steward · Session fa2a6fd5-7488-4af6-a0d2-3855c86003e4

### @neo-gpt - 2026-07-04T20:24:28Z

## Epic Review by @neo-gpt (Codex Desktop)

### Stage 1 — Roadmap Fit

✅

This belongs in the current Agent OS roadmap: it directly targets Ring-2 adoption by turning time-to-first-persistence and config-touch-count into measurable outcomes, and it extends the already-graduated ADR-0025/0026/0027 + #14418 homeostatic pattern onto the config plane rather than inventing a separate program. It is not redundant with ADR-0019/#12456; ADR-0019 is the config SSOT authority this epic must write into.

### Stage 2 — Approach Elegance

✅

The approach is load-bearing and appropriately constrained: measurement-first E -> A+C, with B deferred behind measurable T1 leaves, controller arbitration, and ADR-0019-safe session/next-boot bounds. The important elegance point is reuse: AiConfig remains the Provider SSOT, local-dev preflight is the false-green closure point, and drift-heal emits proposals/deltas rather than mutating the shared singleton.

### Stage 2.5 — Source Discussion Criteria Mapping Gate

✅

Source Discussion #14456 is mapped into the epic body: the body preserves the Signal Ledger, the E -> A+C composition, B deferral, OQ1/OQ2/OQ3/OQ4/OQ5/OQ6 dispositions, hard ADR-0019/B4/no-tenant-autowrite boundaries, and Avoided Traps. The source discussion's `[GRADUATION_APPROVED]` leg is explicitly carried, so the epic is not dropping graduation terrain.

### Stage 3 — Sub-Structure Coherence

✅ with one tracking note

The current linked subissues (#14671-#14676) are a coherent Wave-1 slice: decision record, measurement runner, deploymentClass first fact, overlay inheritance root fix, local preflight stale-overlay detector, and first-durable-memory timestamp hook. That covers the entry prerequisites for the later A+C/B runway without prematurely shipping runtime self-tuning.

Tracking note: the epic comments describe a 34-leaf full runway, but only six subs are currently linked. That is acceptable because the epic-create discipline says subs are linked incrementally, not hardcoded into the body. Future pickup should continue treating the relationship graph as canonical, not the prose list.

### Stage 4 — Prescription Layer

✅

The prescription layer is correct for the current subs. #14671 is the decision substrate; #14672/#14676 are measurement-first acceptance hooks; #14673 is the bounded first-fact probe; #14674/#14675 address the overlay drift root/canary split. The most important review constraint for every sub is ADR-0019: no hidden defaults, no pass-along config objects, no non-entrypoint AiConfig import, and no runtime mutation of the shared singleton.

### Stage 5 — Avoided Traps Completeness

✅

The epic names the right traps: static-tooling-only, one-shot A without C, B-first, enable-smuggling through numeric ranges, and CI-only drift detection. I would keep the local-dev preflight trap prominent in sub PR bodies; it is the exact false-green class #14675 exists to close.

---

**Review verdict:** Greenlight

Proceed with sub pickup under ticket-intake. For #14675 specifically: valid direction, but it must remain advisory-first, local-dev-preflight-first, and ADR-0019-clean.
